powerpagecomponent.content: {"description":"The amount of time the Authentication/LoginThrottling/MaxInvaildAttemptsFromIPAddress are to be within before the IP address has to wait Authentication/LoginThrottling/IpAddressTimeoutTimeSpan. Default: 00:05:00 (5 mins)","value":"00:05:00"}
powerpagecomponent.name: Authentication/LoginThrottling/MaxAttemptsTimeLimitTimeSpan
